description: §15.11.1 — a `bind` prop declared with a non-primitive type SHALL fire E-COMPONENT-014. `List` declares `bind data: string[]` (an array type). Def-time check — no call site is needed to trigger it. Reject (pos) half of the E-COMPONENT-014 pin; clean neg is components/bind-non-primitive-type-clean.
rationale: §15.11.1: 'Bindable props SHALL be restricted to primitive types (string, number, boolean). Declaring a bind prop with a struct or state type SHALL be a compile error (E-COMPONENT-014).' `string[]` is not one of the three primitive types.
